FRONTEND ENGINEER

Location: Canada | Remote
Work Authorization: Canadian work authorization

SUMMARY
Frontend-focused software engineer with 7+ years of experience building production React and TypeScript applications. Strong background in migrations, monorepos, accessibility, E2E testing, and frontend performance.

SKILLS
React, TypeScript, JavaScript, Next.js, Node.js, GraphQL, Apollo Client, TanStack Query, Redux, Zustand, Tailwind CSS, MUI, shadcn/ui, Accessibility, Playwright, Vitest, React Testing Library, pnpm, Turborepo, Firebase

EXPERIENCE

Frontend Engineer | Dealroom | 2021 - Present | Remote
- Migrated complex Dealroom workflows from Ember to React and TypeScript, including access control and real-time synchronization features.
- Implemented Playwright E2E coverage for deal creation and route accessibility testing.
- Rebuilt file picker components with improved UX and performance.
- Contributed to Next.js monorepo foundations and authentication-related frontend integrations.
- Led frontend performance improvements and A/B experimentation initiatives.

Front End Developer | Previous Company | 2018 - 2020 | Canada
- Built reusable design system components with React, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS.
- Integrated CMS-driven content into React applications.
- Established Vitest and React Testing Library patterns for component testing.

PROJECTS
Next.js Monorepo Foundation - Set up pnpm/Turborepo monorepo with shared UI packages and App Router applications.

EDUCATION
Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science | University | 2017
